name: Chicken Almendrado (Rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in margarine and oil in a 10-inch skillet, stirring frequently, until tender.
2. Stir in broth, slivered almonds, ground red chilies, vinegar, sugar, and cinnamon.
3. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
4. Simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
5. Spoon the mixture into a blender. Cover and blend on low speed about 1 minute or until smooth.
6. Return sauce to skillet.
7. Dip chicken breast halves into sauce to coat both sides.
8. Place chicken, skin sides up, in a single layer in skillet.
9. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
10. Cover and simmer for about 45 minutes or until done.
11. Serve sauce over chicken (serves 4).
